requirement_topic.en: Market Access — PSE Certification (DENAN) and Japan-Specific Product Registration
requirement_topic.zh: 市场准入——PSE认证（DENAN）及日本专项产品注册
requirement_topic.zht: 市場准入——PSE認證（DENAN）及日本專項產品注冊

summary.en: EV charging equipment (EVSE) placed on the Japanese market must carry the PSE mark under the Electrical Appliance and Material Safety Act (電気用品安全法, DENAN). EV charging stations are classified as 'specified electrical appliances and materials' (特定電気用品), requiring mandatory third-party certification by a METI-registered Designated Examination Body (登録検査機関) — self-declaration is not permitted for this product category. The PSE diamond mark (〈PSE〉) must be affixed to the product before market placement. In addition, the manufacturer or importer must register as a 'filing business operator' (届出事業者) with METI and maintain technical documentation (技術基準適合証明書). For EV chargers with integrated radio transmitters (Wi-Fi/Bluetooth for network connectivity), separate GITEKI certification under the Radio Act (電波法) is also required before the product can be marketed. Products sold or installed in Japan must be labelled in Japanese, with Japanese-language user manuals and installation instructions. The importer bears legal responsibility for compliance if the manufacturer is outside Japan.
summary.zh: 投放日本市场的电动汽车充电设备（EVSE）须依据《电气用品安全法》（DENAN）加贴PSE标志。电动汽车充电站被归类为「特定电气用品」，须由经济产业省登录的指定检查机构进行强制第三方认证——该产品类别不允许自我声明。PSE菱形标志（〈PSE〉）须在产品投放市场前加贴于产品上。此外，制造商或进口商须向经济产业省登记注册为「申报事业者」，并维护技术文件（技术基准适合证明书）。对于集成无线电发射器（用于网络连接的Wi-Fi/蓝牙）的EV充电设备，还须依据《电波法》另行取得GITEKI认证，方可进行市场推广。在日本销售或安装的产品须使用日语标识，并附有日语用户手册和安装说明。若制造商位于日本境外，进口商承担合规的法律责任。
summary.zht: 投放日本市場的電動汽車充電設備（EVSE）須依據《電氣用品安全法》（DENAN）加貼PSE標誌。電動汽車充電站被歸類為「特定電氣用品」，須由經濟產業省登錄的指定檢查機構進行強制第三方認證——該產品類別不允許自我聲明。PSE菱形標誌（〈PSE〉）須在產品投放市場前加貼於產品上。此外，製造商或進口商須向經濟產業省登記注冊為「申報事業者」，並維護技術文件（技術基準適合證明書）。對於集成無線電發射器（用於網絡連接的Wi-Fi/藍牙）的EV充電設備，還須依據《電波法》另行取得GITEKI認證，方可進行市場推廣。在日本銷售或安裝的產品須使用日語標識，並附有日語用戶手冊和安裝說明。若製造商位於日本境外，進口商承擔合規的法律責任。

standards_or_laws: 電気用品安全法 (Electrical Appliance and Material Safety Act, DENAN) — Law No. 234 of 1961, as amended (METI; mandatory PSE diamond mark for EV charging stations as specified electrical appliances)
電波法 (Radio Act) — Law No. 131 of 1950, as amended (MIC; GITEKI mandatory for radio-transmitting modules in EVSE)
JIS C 61851-1 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — General requirements (IDT IEC 61851-1; applicable safety standard under DENAN pathway)

summary.en: In China, EV charging equipment became subject to mandatory China Compulsory Certification (CCC) from 1 March 2025 under CNCA-C25-01:2024. Prior to that date, EV chargers were subject to voluntary CQC certification. CCC is administered by CNCA (Certification and Accreditation Administration of China) and requires third-party certification by a CNCA-designated Certification Body. CCC certification for EV chargers applies to GB/T 18487.1 (AC charging systems) and related standards. For radio transmitters, SRRC type-approval (issued by MIIT) is the Chinese equivalent of GITEKI. Neither CCC nor SRRC is recognised in Japan, and neither substitutes for PSE/DENAN or GITEKI certification. Chinese-language documentation does not satisfy Japan's Japanese-language labelling requirements.
summary.zh: 在中国，电动汽车充电设备自2025年3月1日起依据CNCA-C25-01:2024实施强制性中国强制认证（CCC）。此前，电动汽车充电设备适用自愿性CQC认证。CCC由国家认证认可监督管理委员会（CNCA）负责管理，须由CNCA指定认证机构进行第三方认证。电动汽车充电设备的CCC认证依据GB/T 18487.1（交流充电系统）及相关标准。对于无线电发射器，SRRC型号核准（由工信部颁发）为中国等同于GITEKI的认证。CCC和SRRC均不被日本认可，均不能替代PSE/DENAN或GITEKI认证。中文文件不满足日本的日语标识要求。
summary.zht: 在中國，電動汽車充電設備自2025年3月1日起依據CNCA-C25-01:2024實施強制性中國強制認證（CCC）。此前，電動汽車充電設備適用自願性CQC認證。CCC由國家認證認可監督管理委員會（CNCA）負責管理，須由CNCA指定認證機構進行第三方認證。電動汽車充電設備的CCC認證依據GB/T 18487.1（交流充電系統）及相關標準。對於無線電發射器，SRRC型號核准（由工信部頒發）為中國等同於GITEKI的認證。CCC和SRRC均不被日本認可，均不能替代PSE/DENAN或GITEKI認證。中文文件不滿足日本的日語標識要求。

standards_or_laws: CNCA-C25-01:2024 — China Compulsory Certification implementation rules for EV charging equipment (mandatory from 1 March 2025)
GB/T 18487.1-2015 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — General requirements (primary CCC test standard for AC EVSE in China)
无线电发射设备型号核准 (SRRC) — MIIT type-approval for radio transmitters (Chinese equivalent of GITEKI; not mutually recognised)

gap.en: Five market-access gaps exist for Chinese EV charging equipment entering Japan: (1) PSE certification — DENAN requires mandatory third-party certification by a METI-registered Designated Examination Body tested to JIS C 61851-1; CCC is not recognised and cannot substitute; (2) METI filing — the manufacturer or importer must register as a filing business operator (届出事業者) with METI and maintain a technical file; this is a separate administrative step with no Chinese equivalent; (3) GITEKI — any radio module (Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, cellular) embedded in the EVSE requires independent GITEKI certification under the Radio Act; SRRC does not satisfy this; (4) Japanese language — all labelling, user manuals, and installation instructions must be in Japanese; Chinese-language documentation is not accepted; (5) Responsible entity in Japan — an importer or Japan-based responsible party is required for METI registration; a Chinese manufacturer without a Japanese importer cannot complete the DENAN filing process. [Uncertain: Whether specific EVSE models require any additional registrations with Japan's Ministry of Land, Infrastructure, Transport and Tourism (MLIT) for public-road-adjacent installations — verify with relevant prefecture authorities.]
gap.zh: 中国电动汽车充电设备进入日本市场存在五项市场准入差距：（1）PSE认证——DENAN要求由经METI登录的指定检查机构按JIS C 61851-1检测并进行强制第三方认证；CCC不被认可，无法替代；（2）METI申报——制造商或进口商须向METI登记注册为申报事业者，并维护技术文件；这是一项独立行政步骤，在中国没有对应要求；（3）GITEKI——EVSE中嵌入的任何无线模块（Wi-Fi、蓝牙、蜂窝网络）须依据《电波法》另行取得GITEKI认证；SRRC不满足此要求；（4）日语要求——所有标识、用户手册及安装说明须使用日语；中文文件不被接受；（5）日本境内责任主体——METI注册须有进口商或日本境内责任方；无日本进口商的中国制造商无法完成DENAN申报流程。【不确定事项：特定EVSE型号在公路旁安装是否还须向日本国土交通省（MLIT）进行其他注册——请向相关都道府县当局核实。】
gap.zht: 中國電動汽車充電設備進入日本市場存在五項市場準入差距：（1）PSE認證——DENAN要求由經METI登錄的指定檢查機構按JIS C 61851-1檢測並進行強制第三方認證；CCC不被認可，無法替代；（2）METI申報——製造商或進口商須向METI登記注冊為申報事業者，並維護技術文件；這是一項獨立行政步驟，在中國沒有對應要求；（3）GITEKI——EVSE中嵌入的任何無線模組（Wi-Fi、藍牙、蜂窩網絡）須依據《電波法》另行取得GITEKI認證；SRRC不滿足此要求；（4）日語要求——所有標識、用戶手冊及安裝說明須使用日語；中文文件不被接受；（5）日本境內責任主體——METI注冊須有進口商或日本境內責任方；無日本進口商的中國製造商無法完成DENAN申報流程。【不確定事項：特定EVSE型號在公路旁安裝是否還須向日本國土交通省（MLIT）進行其他注冊——請向相關都道府縣當局核實。】

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — PSE diamond mark under DENAN required before Japan market placement; GITEKI mandatory for any embedded radio transmitter; Japanese-language labelling and documentation mandatory; METI filing registration mandatory
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC under CNCA-C25-01:2024 from 1 March 2025; SRRC for radio transmitters; Chinese-language labelling required for domestic market

source.publisher: Ministry of Economy, Trade and Industry (METI), Japan

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Market access for Chinese EV charging equipment in Japan requires a multi-step compliance programme: PSE diamond certification by a METI-registered Designated Examination Body (DENAN), METI filing registration, GITEKI for any radio modules, Japanese-language labelling and documentation, and appointment of a Japan-based responsible importer. Chinese CCC certification satisfies none of these requirements. This is one of the most operationally complex market-entry pathways among Japan's product safety regimes. This comparison is informational only and does not constitute legal or regulatory advice.
compliance_verdict.zh: 【仅供参考】中国电动汽车充电设备进入日本市场须完成多步骤合规程序：经METI登录的指定检查机构进行PSE菱形认证（DENAN）、METI申报注册、无线模块取得GITEKI认证、日语标识和文件、以及委任日本境内责任进口商。中国CCC认证对上述任何要求均不构成满足。这是日本产品安全制度中操作最为复杂的市场准入路径之一。本比较仅供参考，不构成法律或监管建议。
compliance_verdict.zht: 【僅供參考】中國電動汽車充電設備進入日本市場須完成多步驟合規程序：經METI登錄的指定檢查機構進行PSE菱形認證（DENAN）、METI申報注冊、無線模組取得GITEKI認證、日語標識和文件、以及委任日本境內責任進口商。中國CCC認證對上述任何要求均不構成滿足。這是日本產品安全制度中操作最為複雜的市場準入路徑之一。本比較僅供參考，不構成法律或監管建議。

requirement_topic.en: Japan Responsible Importer and Labelling Requirements under DENAN
requirement_topic.zh: DENAN下的日本责任进口商及标识要求
requirement_topic.zht: DENAN下的日本責任進口商及標識要求

summary.en: Under DENAN, any business that imports specified electrical appliances and materials (特定電気用品, which includes EV charging stations) from outside Japan must register with METI as a filing business operator (届出事業者) before the first unit is imported. The importer must: (a) obtain a conformity certificate from a METI-registered Designated Examination Body; (b) register with METI (submitting company name, address, types of products, and start-of-business date); (c) affix the PSE diamond mark and display the importer's name, address, and rated specifications on the product label. Japanese law requires that the label show: rated voltage, rated current (or rated power), rated frequency, and the importer's name or trade name and address — all in Japanese. Without an importer registered with METI, products cannot legally enter the Japanese market. There is no provision in DENAN for a foreign manufacturer to act as the filing operator without a Japan-based entity.
summary.zh: 依据DENAN，任何从日本境外进口特定电气用品（包括电动汽车充电站）的企业，在首次进口前须向经济产业省登记注册为申报事业者。进口商须：（a）从经METI登录的指定检查机构取得合格证明书；（b）向METI进行登记（提交公司名称、地址、产品种类及业务开始日期）；（c）在产品标签上加贴PSE菱形标志，并标注进口商名称、地址及额定规格。日本法律要求标签须注明（均用日语）：额定电压、额定电流（或额定功率）、额定频率，以及进口商名称或商号及地址。若无向METI登记注册的进口商，产品不得合法进入日本市场。DENAN不允许外国制造商在无日本境内实体的情况下作为申报业者。
summary.zht: 依據DENAN，任何從日本境外進口特定電氣用品（包括電動汽車充電站）的企業，在首次進口前須向經濟產業省登記注冊為申報事業者。進口商須：（a）從經METI登錄的指定檢查機構取得合格證明書；（b）向METI進行登記（提交公司名稱、地址、產品種類及業務開始日期）；（c）在產品標籤上加貼PSE菱形標誌，並標注進口商名稱、地址及額定規格。日本法律要求標籤須注明（均用日語）：額定電壓、額定電流（或額定功率）、額定頻率，以及進口商名稱或商號及地址。若無向METI登記注冊的進口商，產品不得合法進入日本市場。DENAN不允許外國製造商在無日本境內實體的情況下作為申報業者。

standards_or_laws: 電気用品安全法 (DENAN) — Law No. 234 of 1961, as amended — Articles governing filing business operators (届出事業者) and product labelling requirements
電気用品安全法施行規則 (DENAN Enforcement Regulations) — METI Ministerial Ordinance (specifies labelling requirements including rated specifications and business operator details in Japanese)

summary.en: Under China's CCC system, the CCC certificate holder must be a Chinese legal entity (manufacturer or importer). The CCC certificate includes the manufacturer's name and address. Chinese product labelling requirements under GB 5226.1 and relevant product standards specify Chinese-language labels with rated voltage, current, power, and manufacturer information. No direct equivalent of DENAN's mandatory importer registration concept exists in China's export regulations. Chinese manufacturers exporting to Japan bear no statutory domestic obligation to appoint a Japan-based responsible entity — that obligation is imposed by Japanese law on the Japanese importer.
summary.zh: 在中国CCC制度下，CCC证书持有人须为中国法人实体（制造商或进口商）。CCC证书包含制造商名称和地址。GB 5226.1及相关产品标准对产品标识的要求规定须使用中文标签，注明额定电压、电流、功率及制造商信息。中国出口法规中不存在与DENAN强制进口商注册概念直接对应的要求。中国制造商出口至日本时，并无国内法定义务指定日本境内责任主体——该义务由日本法律施加于日本进口商。
summary.zht: 在中國CCC制度下，CCC證書持有人須為中國法人實體（製造商或進口商）。CCC證書包含製造商名稱和地址。GB 5226.1及相關產品標準對產品標識的要求規定須使用中文標籤，注明額定電壓、電流、功率及製造商信息。中國出口法規中不存在與DENAN強制進口商注冊概念直接對應的要求。中國製造商出口至日本時，並無國內法定義務指定日本境內責任主體——該義務由日本法律施加於日本進口商。

standards_or_laws: CNCA-C25-01:2024 — CCC implementation rules for EV charging equipment (China; manufacturer or importer as certificate holder)
GB 5226.1-2019 — Safety of machinery — Electrical equipment of machines (Chinese labelling baseline for electrical industrial equipment)

gap.en: A Chinese EV charger manufacturer without a Japanese importer partner cannot legally bring its products to the Japanese market: (1) No Japan-based entity → METI filing registration is impossible → PSE diamond mark cannot be affixed → product import is unlawful under DENAN; (2) Chinese-language product labels and documentation must be fully re-done in Japanese — this includes all panel markings, the nameplate (rated voltage, current, frequency, importer details), user manual, installation manual, and safety warnings; (3) The importer's name and address (Japanese entity) must appear on the product label — a Chinese address is not sufficient. This requirement creates a structural go-to-market dependency on a Japan-established business entity (importer, distributor, or subsidiary) that is absent from the Chinese domestic CCC framework.
gap.zh: 没有日本进口商合作伙伴的中国EV充电设备制造商无法合法将产品引入日本市场：（1）无日本境内实体→无法完成METI申报注册→无法加贴PSE菱形标志→产品进口在DENAN项下属违法；（2）中文产品标签和文件须全部重新以日语制作——包括所有面板标识、铭牌（额定电压、电流、频率、进口商信息）、用户手册、安装手册及安全警告；（3）进口商名称和地址（日本实体）须标注于产品标签上——仅有中国地址不满足要求。这一要求在市场进入层面形成了对日本设立的业务实体（进口商、经销商或子公司）的结构性依赖，而中国国内CCC框架中不存在这一依赖关系。
gap.zht: 沒有日本進口商合作夥伴的中國EV充電設備製造商無法合法將產品引入日本市場：（1）無日本境內實體→無法完成METI申報注冊→無法加貼PSE菱形標誌→產品進口在DENAN項下屬違法；（2）中文產品標籤和文件須全部重新以日語製作——包括所有面板標識、銘牌（額定電壓、電流、頻率、進口商信息）、用戶手冊、安裝手冊及安全警告；（3）進口商名稱和地址（日本實體）須標注於產品標籤上——僅有中國地址不滿足要求。這一要求在市場進入層面形成了對日本設立的業務實體（進口商、經銷商或子公司）的結構性依賴，而中國國內CCC框架中不存在這一依賴關係。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — METI filing registration (届出事業者) and Japanese-language labelling are legal requirements under DENAN for any EVSE imported into Japan; no exemption exists for foreign manufacturers
mandatory_status.cn: N/A — China has no equivalent outbound-export registration obligation; CCC certificate holder must be a China legal entity for the domestic market

source.publisher: Ministry of Economy, Trade and Industry (METI), Japan

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Japanese law requires a Japan-based filing business operator (importer) registered with METI before any specified electrical appliance — including EV charging stations — can be legally placed on the Japanese market. Chinese manufacturers must appoint a Japan-based importer or establish a local subsidiary before market entry. Japanese-language labelling covering rated specifications and the importer's details is mandatory on the product itself. This comparison is informational only and does not constitute legal or regulatory advice.
compliance_verdict.zh: 【仅供参考】日本法律要求在任何特定电气用品（包括电动汽车充电站）合法投放日本市场之前，须有已向METI登记注册的日本境内申报事业者（进口商）。中国制造商须在进入市场前委任日本境内进口商或设立本地子公司。产品本身须有日语标识，注明额定规格和进口商信息，此为强制要求。本比较仅供参考，不构成法律或监管建议。
compliance_verdict.zht: 【僅供參考】日本法律要求在任何特定電氣用品（包括電動汽車充電站）合法投放日本市場之前，須有已向METI登記注冊的日本境內申報事業者（進口商）。中國製造商須在進入市場前委任日本境內進口商或設立本地子公司。產品本身須有日語標識，注明額定規格和進口商信息，此為強制要求。本比較僅供參考，不構成法律或監管建議。
